LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Bighorner.description: 大角羊的变异后代。这些生命力顽强的生物通常在荒地中被用作驮畜和牲畜，因其力量、肉和皮而受到重视。雄性拥有令人印象深刻的弯曲角，比雌性更大、更具攻击性。
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Bighorner.label: 比格霍纳
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radstag.description: A heavily irradiated radstag that emits an eerie green glow. Prolonged exposure to radiation has made these creatures larger and more aggressive than normal radstags. Their meat is highly radioactive and 危险 to consume, but their glowing presence makes them easy to spot at night.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radstag.label: 发光的辐射雄鹿
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radstag.tools.0.label: 左蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radstag.tools.1.label: 右蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Glowing_Radstag.tools.2.label: 左头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Pale_Radstag.description: A rare albino variant of the radstag, with pale white fur and lighter build. These creatures are less affected by radiation than their common cousins, making them slightly weaker but also less 危险 to handle. They're prized for their distinctive appearance.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Pale_Radstag.label: 苍白的辐射雄鹿
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Pale_Radstag.tools.0.label: 左蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Pale_Radstag.tools.1.label: 右蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Pale_Radstag.tools.2.label: 左头
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radstag.description: A mutated two-headed deer, one of the more common creatures in the wasteland. Despite their unusual appearance, radstags are generally docile herbivores that travel in s商场 herds. Their meat is edible and their hides make decent leather, though both carry traces of radiation.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radstag.label: 拉德斯塔
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radstag.tools.0.label: 左蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radstag.tools.1.label: 右蹄
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Radstag.tools.2.label: 左头
